description: Canonical measure definitions for Ireland Civic Data Project. Every data point published on the site must map to one of these measure codes.

measures.label: GDP per capita (PPS)
measures.description: Gross Domestic Product per capita expressed in Purchasing Power Standards (EU=100). Severely distorted for Ireland by MNC activity. Never publish alone — always show alongside GNI_STAR_PC and AIC_PC_PPS.
measures.caveat: Ireland GDP inflated by MNC IP domiciling and redomiciled PLCs. Use GNI* for domestic economy size and AIC for welfare comparison.

measures.label: GNI* per capita (Modified GNI)
measures.description: Modified Gross National Income per capita. Ireland-specific metric stripping out MNC distortions: IP depreciation, aircraft leasing, redomiciled PLC income. Best measure of Irish domestic economy size.
measures.caveat: Ireland-specific metric only — cannot be directly compared to other EU countries' GDP. Use to show Ireland GDP/GNI* gap, use AIC_PC_PPS for cross-country comparison.

measures.label: Actual Individual Consumption per capita (PPS)
measures.description: All goods and services actually consumed by households, whether paid for directly, by government, or by NGOs. Expressed in Purchasing Power Standards. Eurostat's recommended welfare comparison metric. Not distorted by MNC activity.
measures.caveat: National only — no regional breakdown available.

measures.label: Household consumption price level index
measures.description: Comparative price level index for household final consumption expenditure. EU average = 100. Ireland scored 138 in 2024 — 2nd highest in EU after Denmark.

measures.label: Median equivalised disposable income
measures.description: Median net household income after taxes and transfers, adjusted for household size. Directly comparable across EU.

measures.label: At-risk-of-poverty rate
measures.description: % of population with income below 60% of national median equivalised disposable income.

measures.label: GVA per capita
measures.description: Gross Value Added per capita at basic prices. Preferred regional economic output measure — less distorted than GDP at regional level.
measures.caveat: County-level data is indicative only. Cork/Kerry suppressed — South-West NUTS3 only. Commuting distorts Mid-East and Dublin figures.

measures.label: Gross disposable income per capita
measures.description: Gross disposable income per person — closer to what residents actually receive than GVA.

measures.label: Income tax receipts
measures.description: Total income tax receipts by year/month.

measures.label: Corporation tax receipts
measures.description: Total corporation tax receipts. Highly concentrated — top 10 payers account for majority of receipts.
measures.caveat: Highly volatile and concentrated. Do not project trends without noting MNC dependency risk.

measures.label: VAT receipts
measures.description: Total VAT receipts.

measures.label: Total tax revenue
measures.description: Total government tax revenue across all heads.

measures.label: Gross departmental expenditure
measures.description: Gross voted expenditure by government department or Vote.
measures.source: DPER Revised Estimates for Public Services

measures.label: Capital expenditure
measures.description: Capital voted expenditure — investment in assets, infrastructure, etc.
measures.source: DPER Revised Estimates for Public Services

measures.label: Current expenditure
measures.description: Current voted expenditure — day-to-day running costs.
measures.source: DPER Revised Estimates for Public Services

measures.label: IPAS accommodation expenditure
measures.description: State expenditure on International Protection Accommodation Service (asylum seeker accommodation). Flagship accountability case study.
measures.source: DPER / Department of Integration spending reports
measures.caveat: Figures sourced from ministerial statements, parliamentary questions, and published accounts. Cross-reference multiple sources.

measures.label: Contract award value
measures.description: Value of a public contract awarded via eTenders.
measures.caveat: Only contracts over €25k required to be published. Award values sometimes missing or estimated.

measures.label: Contract count
measures.description: Number of contracts awarded by contracting authority, sector, or supplier.

measures.label: Health expenditure as % of GDP
measures.description: Total health expenditure as a share of GDP. Use alongside AIC comparison — GDP distortion makes Ireland look like a high health spender.
measures.caveat: GDP-based metric — inflated for Ireland. Supplement with per-capita absolute figures.

measures.label: Health expenditure per capita
measures.description: Total health expenditure per capita in PPS. Better cross-country comparison than % of GDP for Ireland.

measures.label: HSE total expenditure
measures.description: Total HSE voted expenditure (pay + non-pay + capital).

measures.label: Lobbying returns filed
measures.description: Number of lobbying returns filed in a given period, by organisation, sector, or policy area.
measures.caveat: Self-reported. No financial disclosure. Returns due every 4 months.

measures.label: Designated Public Officials lobbied
measures.description: Number of unique DPOs (ministers, senior officials) lobbied per organisation or period.
